statue.example: A tall statue stands in the park.
statue.example_zh: 公園裡矗立著一座高大的雕像。

steady.example: Keep a steady hand when you draw.

steal.example: It is wrong to steal from others.
steal.example_zh: 偷別人的東西是不對的。

steam.example: Steam rose from the hot soup.
She steamed the fish for dinner.

steep.example: The hill was too steep to climb.

sticky.example: My hands are sticky from the candy.
sticky.example_zh: 我的手因為糖果而黏黏的。

stiff.example: My neck feels stiff this morning.
stiff.example_zh: 今天早上我的脖子很僵。

sting.example: A bee can sting if you bother it.
The cut gave a sharp sting.

stir.example: Stir the soup so it doesn't burn.

stitch.example: The doctor put three stitches in the cut.
stitch.example_zh: 醫生在傷口上縫了三針。

stitch.example: She stitched the button back on.

stomach.example: My stomach hurts after eating too much.

stool.example: He sat on a wooden stool.

stormy.example: It was a dark and stormy night.
stormy.example_zh: 那是個漆黑又狂風暴雨的夜晚。

stove.example: She heated the pan on the stove.
stove.example_zh: 她在爐子上把鍋子加熱。

strategy.example: They planned a strategy to win the game.
strategy.example_zh: 他們擬定了贏得比賽的策略。

straw.example: The bird made a nest of straw.
She drank the juice through a straw.

strength.example: He used all his strength to push the door.

strip.example: She cut the paper into thin strips.
He stripped the paint off the wall.

structure.example: The bridge has a strong structure.

stubborn.example: The stubborn child refused to listen.
stubborn.example_zh: 那個固執的孩子不肯聽話。

studio.example: The artist works in a small studio.
studio.example_zh: 那位藝術家在一間小工作室工作。

stuff.example: Please put your stuff in the box.
stuff.example_zh: 請把你的東西放進箱子裡。

stuff.example: She stuffed the bag with clothes.

suburb.example: They moved to a quiet suburb.
suburb.example_zh: 他們搬到一個安靜的郊區。

suffer.example: Many people suffer during a war.

sufficient.example: We have sufficient food for the trip.
sufficient.example_zh: 我們有足夠的食物供這趟旅行。

suicide.example: The hotline helps people who think about suicide.
suicide.example_zh: 這條專線幫助有自殺念頭的人。

sum.example: The sum of two and three is five.
Let me sum up the main points.

summary.example: Write a short summary of the story.
summary.example_zh: 寫一段這個故事的簡短摘要。

summit.example: They reached the summit at noon.
World leaders met at the summit.
summit.example_zh: 各國領袖在高峰會上會面。

superior.example: This brand is superior to that one.
She reported it to her superior.
superior.example_zh: 她向上司報告了這件事。

surround.example_zh: 樹木環繞著那棟小房子。

survey.example: The survey asked about our eating habits.
survey.example_zh: 這項調查詢問我們的飲食習慣。

survey.example: They surveyed the land before building.
survey.example_zh: 他們在動工前勘測土地。

survivor.example: The survivor told us his story.
survivor.example_zh: 那名生還者向我們述說他的故事。

suspect.example: The police suspect he stole the money.

suspicion.example_zh: 她奇怪的回答引起了懷疑。

swan.example: A white swan glided across the lake.

swear.example: I swear I am telling the truth.
He swore when he hit his hand.

sweat.example: He wiped the sweat from his forehead.
We sweat a lot in summer.

swell.example: Her ankle began to swell after the fall.
swell.example_zh: 跌倒後她的腳踝開始腫起來。

swift.example: The deer made a swift escape.

sword.example: The knight drew his shiny sword.

tablet.example: Take one tablet after each meal.
She reads books on her tablet.

tag.example: The price tag says fifty dollars.
She tagged the photo with my name.
tag.example_zh: 她在照片上標記了我的名字。

tailor.example: The tailor made him a fine suit.
tailor.example_zh: 裁縫師替他做了一套精緻的西裝。

talent.example: She has a talent for singing.

tame.example: The rabbit is tame and gentle.
tame.example_zh: 這隻兔子既溫馴又溫和。

tame.example: It is hard to tame a wild horse.

tank.example: He keeps fish in a glass tank.

tap.example: She tapped me gently on the shoulder.
tap.example_zh: 她輕輕拍了拍我的肩膀。

tap.example: Turn off the tap to save water.
tap.example_zh: 關掉水龍頭以節約用水。

tasty.example: The soup was warm and tasty.

technical.example: He has a technical problem with his computer.
technical.example_zh: 他的電腦有技術上的問題。

technique.example: She learned a new painting technique.
technique.example_zh: 她學了一種新的繪畫技巧。

teenage.example_zh: 他們有兩個十幾歲的孩子。

temper.example: He lost his temper and shouted.

temporary.example: This is only a temporary job.

tend.example: Cats tend to sleep during the day.
She tends the garden every day.

tender.example: The meat was soft and tender.
She gave the baby a tender look.
tender.example_zh: 她溫柔地看了寶寶一眼。

tent.example: We set up a tent by the river.
